commands.review_summary:
The branch caps `openclaw sessions` output to the newest 100 rows by default, adds `--limit <n|all>`, emits JSON pagination metadata, and updates docs, tests, and the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main builds, sorts, and JSON-enriches every session row from the stores without a CLI limit, while Gateway already uses a bounded default. I did not execute a large-store command because this review was read-only.
